title: Neviti Elegant Butterfly Place Cards, Paper, Silver, 9.5 x 5 x 0.2 cm
features: 10 stunning place cards featuring an elegant design of silver butterflies against a crisp white background
Show your guests to their seats in true style
description: Product Description A wedding essential, these place cards feature an understated, elegant design of silver butterflies against a crisp white background. Featuring plenty of room on which to write your guests' names, these pretty cards complement a classic white and silver colour scheme perfectly. Supplied in packs of 50 cards Box Contains 50 x place cards
